notes: Comments identity/open-state core remains unchanged from accepted CC7.5.6.
Added clean admin flows for buttons: channel -> post -> button text -> action -> review/save.
Added clean admin flows for gifts: channel -> post -> title -> file/link -> mode -> review/save.
Final save is required before settings are applied to a post.
After save, selected post is force-repatched with comments button plus CTA/gift rows.
Menu cleanup uses one active menu pattern from existing DB menu state.
No overlay, no floating hints, no public/app.js override, no external code.run /app comments button.
